zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Avenel於大約1117年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，他的父親William Avenel39歲，母親Avice de Avenel29歲。他於大約1140年與Sybil在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1170年被列為justiciar in lothian。他去世於1185年3月8日在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋藍霍爾姆享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛包爾梅露絲。

nameMeanings.name: Avenel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Avenell
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Avenel, a double diminutive of ancient Germanic Avo. The surname was later confused with Averill .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Avenel was born about 1117, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Avenel, was 39 and his mother, Avice de Avenel, was 29. He married Sybil about 1140, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1170, his occupation is listed as justiciar in lothian. He died on 8 March 1185, in Langholm, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

Il a épousé Sybil environ 1140, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1170, sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar in lothian. Il est décédé le 8 mars 1185, à Langholm, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Melrose, Roxburghshire, Écosse.

Er hat um 1140 in Scotland Sybil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1170 ist sein Beruf als justiciar in lothian aufgeführt. Er starb am 8. März 1185 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Langholm, Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Melrose, Roxburghshire, Scotland begraben.

ko.Langholm, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 랭홀름
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Avenel(이)가 대략 1117년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Avenel(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice de Avenel(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1140년 스컷랜드에서 Sybil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1170년, 그의 직업은 justiciar in lothian이었다. 그는 1185년 3월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 랭홀름에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 멜로즈에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Sybil aproximadamente 1140, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1170, sua profissão aparece como justiciar in lothian. ru.Langholm, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotlan: лангхолм, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Avenel родился около 1117 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Avenel было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice de Avenel, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil около 1140 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1170 году он работал по профессии justiciar in lothian. Он умер 8 марта 1185 г. в местности лангхолм, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности мелрос, роксбургшир, Шотландия.
